title: Day 8 Lesson 2 ( Video )Giving a personal impression
html:
Day 8 - Lesson 2

かんそう を いう (kansoo o iu)  = Giving a personal impression

ばしょ (Location): らーめんや（らあめんや, ramenya) = ramen shop

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): にほんじん の がくせい, りゅう がくせい (nihonjin no gaksee, ryuugaksee) = Japanese student, study abroad student

For the new words in this video, please check the subtitles and refer to the vocabulary section.
